chat-service.description: creates a chat; user_id will be inferred from the headers in the request and will be used to check if the user exists (via user-db) and then for creating a chat in the chat-db. title will default to 'new chat'

downstreamDescriptions.user-db: checks that the X-User-Id header refers to an existing user before creating a chat
downstreamDescriptions.chat-db: inserts the new chat row (user_id from the header, title defaults to 'new chat')

history.description: creates a chat; user_id will be inferred from the headers in the request and will be used to check if the user exists (via user-db) and then for creating a chat in the chat-db. title will default to 'new chat'

chat-service.description: get chats for user; user_id is from header; chats should be ordered by updated_at; cursor is start index (default to 0) and maxChats is how many to query (default to 10)

downstreamDescriptions.chat-db: reads the caller's chat rows (user_id from the X-User-Id header) ordered by updated_at, paged with cursor as offset and maxChats as limit

history.description: get chats for user; user_id is from header; chats should be ordered by updated_at; cursor is start index (default to 0) and maxChats is how many to query (default to 10)
